title: Do You Want the Good News or the Bad News?
introHtml: Hey... you may want to sit down. It's not all bad though, there's some good news too.

questions.prompt: I'm not gonna lie, it's pretty bad. You might want to start with the good news.

answers.label: I'm bad with decisions. You choose which one to tell me first.

questions.prompt: I really think you're gonna be happier in the long run if you hear the good news first.

answers.label: You tell me right now. I need to know how bad it is.
You know, I think I would like the good news.

questions.prompt: To be perfectly candid, it's really fucking bad. Let's just start with the good news, alright?

answers.label: I need to get this over with. What's the bad news?
Fine. This better be some fucking good news.
I'm in a good mood. I think I'd like the good news first.

questions.prompt: Why not just sit down, relax, have a beer. We can get to the bad news in a bit, but right now, why not something to cheer you up?

answers.label: Jesus fucking Christ, just tell me the bad news already.
I already said I'm fine with the good news first.

questions.prompt: Seriously, though. You should seriously consider hearing the good news first. It'll make what I have to tell you so much easier.

answers.label: Again, I would like to reiterate that I am fine hearing whatever the good thing you have to say is first.
Is this a fucking game to you?
I have no preference. I can see the merit in either option. I will leave the decision in your capable hands.

questions.prompt: Last chance... the bad news 👎😟 ...or  the good news 👍😁?

answers.label: I will kill you and your fucking family. You have truly reached the end of my patience. I hope this bullshit barrage of questions you have tormented me with while keeping me in anguished suspense was fucking worth it, you worthless piece of shit.

results.title: You Want the Bad News
results.contentHtml: Man, you're really insistent. Alright, but don't say I didn't warn you.

results.title: You Want the Good News
results.contentHtml: I think you made the right choice. This should really help put the bad news in perspective.
